title: bunium capusii
intro: Bunium capusii, also known as black caraway or black cumin, is a plant species within the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Traditionally, black cumin has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and enhance immune function. The health benefits of black cumin are attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as arthritis, diabetes, and respiratory issues. Black cumin is often prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or supplement, and can also be used as a spice in culinary applications.
